title: The Tasting with Ms. Vinter
introKo:
소믈리에 Ms. Vinter의 와인 시음회에서 향과 바디감을 배우는 아주 우아한 이야기.
…표면적으로는요.
introEn:
Learning aroma and body at Ms. Vinter's wine tasting. Perfectly elegant.
...on the surface.

quiz.q: Ms. Vinter가 유난히 열정적으로 설명한 것은?

0000.name: 아껴 둔 첫 모금
0000.en: You held back all evening — a slow swirl, a careful nose, a small and patient sip. You never asked to return, and Ms. Vinter still wonders about you. "Some guests," she says, "save the best sip for a night that never comes."
0000.ko: 당신은 저녁 내내 아꼈어요. 느린 스월, 조심스러운 향 맡기, 작고 참을성 있는 한 모금. 다시 오겠다는 말도 없었고, Ms. Vinter는 아직도 당신이 궁금하대요. "어떤 손님은 가장 좋은 한 모금을 오지 않을 밤을 위해 아껴 둬요." 그녀가 말해요.

0001.name: 다시 오는 애호가
0001.en: You were gentle with the swirl, shy with the nose, and small with your sip — but you did book the next tasting before you left. Now you return every month, a little braver each time. "Slow to open," Ms. Vinter tells her friends, "but he always comes back."
0001.ko: 당신은 스월에 부드럽고, 향에 수줍고, 한 모금은 작았어요. 그래도 떠나기 전에 다음 시음회를 예약했죠. 이제 매달 다시 와요. 올 때마다 조금씩 더 용감하게요. "천천히 열리는 사람이에요. 그래도 꼭 다시 오죠." Ms. Vinter가 친구들에게 말해요.

0010.name: 말없이 풀바디
0010.en: You said little all evening, but you took the full body in one generous mouthful — and Ms. Vinter noticed. "Quiet ones surprise you," she tells the room. The fullest glass now waits quietly for you.
0010.ko: 당신은 저녁 내내 말수가 적었지만, 크게 한 모금에 풀바디를 통째로 받아들였죠. Ms. Vinter는 그걸 놓치지 않았어요. "조용한 사람이 사람을 놀래키죠." 그녀가 좌중에 말해요. 이제 가장 꽉 찬 잔이 조용히 당신을 기다려요.

0011.name: 천천히 데워진 단골
0011.en: You began quietly, but by the end you took the full body and booked the next night too. Ms. Vinter loves that kind of slow burn. "Careful at first, greedy by the finish," she says. "My favorite wines open the very same way."
0011.ko: 당신은 조용히 시작했지만, 끝에는 풀바디를 다 받아들이고 다음 밤까지 예약했어요. Ms. Vinter는 그런 슬로우 번을 사랑해요. "처음엔 신중하다가 피니시엔 욕심을 내죠." 그녀가 말해요. "제가 제일 좋아하는 와인도 딱 그렇게 열려요."

0100.name: 향에 빠진 코
0100.nameEn: The Nose That Fell for It
0100.en: Everything about you was gentle — except your nose, which dove in and would not come up. "He fell for the aroma," Ms. Vinter laughs. Her most fragrant bottle now opens the moment you arrive.
0100.ko: 당신은 모든 게 부드러웠어요. 코만 빼고요. 한번 파고들더니 올라올 줄을 몰랐죠. "향에 빠져버렸네요." Ms. Vinter가 웃어요. 이제 그녀의 가장 향기로운 병이 당신이 오는 순간 열려요.

0101.name: 향을 쫓는 손님
0101.nameEn: The One Who Chases the Nose
0101.en: You chased the aroma with your eyes closed and came back for more, month after month. You never took a bold sip, yet you never missed a tasting either. "He comes for the nose," Ms. Vinter says, "and stays for the finish."
0101.ko: 당신은 눈을 감고 향을 쫓았고, 매달매달 더 맡으러 다시 왔어요. 대담한 한 모금은 없었지만, 시음회를 거른 적도 없었죠. "향을 맡으러 와서, 피니시까지 머물다 가요." Ms. Vinter가 말해요.

0110.name: 한 잔의 완벽주의자
0110.en: You breathed the aroma deep and took the full body without a word, then finished your one glass and quietly went home. "All that feeling," Ms. Vinter sighs at the door, "and he only came once." She is still saving a bottle for the night you return.
0110.ko: 당신은 향을 깊이 들이마시고 말없이 풀바디를 받아들인 뒤, 한 잔을 비우고 조용히 집에 갔어요. "그렇게 느낄 줄 아는 사람이." Ms. Vinter가 문가에서 한숨지어요. "딱 한 번 오다니요." 그녀는 아직도 당신이 다시 올 밤을 위해 병 하나를 아껴 둬요.

0111.name: 늦게 열린 병
0111.en: You were shy with the swirl, but the nose opened you, the full body warmed you, and by the end you booked the next night. "A bottle that opens late," Ms. Vinter smiles, "is often the finest one at the table."
0111.ko: 당신은 스월엔 수줍었지만, 향이 당신을 열었고, 풀바디가 당신을 데웠고, 끝엔 다음 밤을 예약했어요. "늦게 열린 병이." Ms. Vinter가 웃어요. "식탁에서 제일 좋은 병일 때가 많죠."

1000.name: 손목만 자신만만
1000.en: You swirled like a natural and made sure she saw your wrist — then grew careful with everything after. Ms. Vinter found it charming. "Big swirl, gentle sips," she says. "Honestly, the safest kind of guest."
1000.ko: 당신은 타고난 것처럼 스월을 했고, 손목을 그녀에게 꼭 보여줬죠. 그러고는 그다음부턴 뭐든 조심스러웠어요. Ms. Vinter는 그게 귀엽대요. "스월은 크고, 한 모금은 얌전하고. 솔직히 제일 안전한 손님이에요." 그녀가 말해요.

1001.name: 약속을 지키는 혀
1001.nameEn: The Tongue That Keeps Its Word
1001.en: You opened with a confident swirl and closed by booking the next tasting — everything between was quiet and careful. Now the same night returns each month: her bottle, your wrist. "Some men only swirl," she tells her friends. "Mine comes back."
1001.ko: 당신은 자신 있는 스월로 시작해서, 다음 시음회를 예약하며 마무리했어요. 그 사이는 전부 조용하고 조심스러웠죠. 이제 매달 같은 밤이 돌아와요. 그녀의 병, 당신의 손목. "스월만 하는 남자도 많은데." 그녀가 친구들에게 말해요. "우리 집 손님은 진짜 다시 와요."

1010.name: 과감한 한 모금
1010.en: A confident wrist and a generous mouthful of the full body — that is how Ms. Vinter describes you now. You never asked to return, yet her boldest bottle somehow waits open whenever you walk in. Funny how that works.
1010.ko: 자신 있는 손목과 풀바디를 크게 머금는 한 모금. 요즘 Ms. Vinter가 당신을 그렇게 소개해요. 다시 오겠다는 말은 없었는데, 이상하게 그녀의 가장 대담한 병이 당신이 들어올 때면 열려 있어요. 참 신기한 일이죠.

1011.name: 돌아오는 대담함
1011.en: Confident swirl, full body, and the next night booked before she could offer — only the nose you took slowly. The other guests keep asking who her new regular is. Ms. Vinter just smiles and pours you another taste.
1011.ko: 자신 있는 스월, 풀바디, 그리고 그녀가 권하기도 전에 예약한 다음 밤. 천천히 간 건 향 하나뿐이었죠. 다른 손님들은 그녀의 새 단골이 누구냐고 자꾸 물어요. Ms. Vinter는 그저 웃으며 당신에게 한 잔 더 따라 줘요.

1100.name: 향으로 시작한 사람
1100.nameEn: The One Who Led with the Nose
1100.en: You led with a bold swirl and a deep, eager nose, then turned gentle for the rest of the night. "He opens loud and finishes soft," Ms. Vinter says. She likes a guest who knows when to slow down.
1100.ko: 당신은 대담한 스월과 깊고 열정적인 향으로 시작했다가, 남은 밤엔 부드러워졌어요. "열 땐 요란하고, 끝낼 땐 부드럽죠." Ms. Vinter가 말해요. 그녀는 언제 천천히 가야 하는지 아는 손님을 좋아해요.

1101.name: 여운을 예약한 사람
1101.nameEn: The One Who Booked the Afterglow
1101.en: Bold with the swirl, deep with the nose, and back for every tasting after — the only thing you took slowly was the sip on your tongue. "The best evenings," Ms. Vinter says, "are the ones you let linger." Yours always do.
1101.ko: 스월은 대담하게, 향은 깊게, 그다음 시음회마다 다시 왔죠. 천천히 한 건 혀 위의 한 모금 하나뿐이었어요. "제일 좋은 저녁은 여운을 남기는 저녁이에요." Ms. Vinter가 말해요. 당신의 저녁은 늘 그래요.

1110.name: 완벽한 한 잔, 그리고 침묵
1110.en: A bold swirl, a deep nose, the full body taken whole — you did it all, said the wine was perfect, and went home. Ms. Vinter stood at the door a long while. Some guests, she thinks, are like a perfect glass: unforgettable, and gone too soon.
1110.ko: 대담한 스월, 깊은 향, 통째로 받아들인 풀바디. 당신은 전부 해내고는 와인이 완벽하다는 말만 남기고 집에 갔어요. Ms. Vinter는 한참 문가에 서 있었죠. 어떤 손님은 완벽한 한 잔 같아요. 잊히지 않는데, 너무 빨리 사라지죠.

1111.name: 밤이 길어지는 단골
1111.nameEn: The Regular Who Makes the Night Longer
1111.en: By the end of the season, the whole tasting room talks about you — bold swirl, deep nose, full body, and always one more night booked. Ms. Vinter tells her friends you have the finest palate in the city. And the regulars notice one small thing: she now saves the last glass of every bottle for you.
1111.ko: 시즌이 끝날 무렵, 시음회장 전체가 당신 이야기를 해요. 대담한 스월, 깊은 향, 풀바디, 그리고 언제나 예약된 다음 밤. Ms. Vinter는 친구들에게 당신이 이 도시에서 가장 좋은 미각을 가졌다고 말해요. 그리고 단골들은 작은 변화 하나를 눈치채요. 이제 그녀가 모든 병의 마지막 잔을 당신을 위해 남겨 둔다는 걸요.

normal.text: You arrive at a small wine tasting. Ms. Vinter, the sommelier, greets you with a warm smile. "Come closer," she says. "Tonight we take it slow."
She pours a little red wine into your glass. "Just a taste for now," she says. "Hold the glass by the stem, not the bowl."

options.en: I know how to swirl. My wrist is quite good.
options.ko: 스월은 좀 하죠. 제 손목이 꽤 좋거든요.

options.en: Please show me slowly. This is my first time.
options.reaction: "Don't worry," she smiles. "Everyone has a first taste."

normal.text: You swirl the wine gently. It spins and climbs the glass. "Good," she says. "Now the aromas begin to open."
"Put your nose in," Ms. Vinter says. "Breathe it in. A good wine likes to be smelled before it is tasted."

options.en: How deep should my nose go? Like this?
options.ko: 코를 얼마나 깊이 넣어야 해요? 이렇게요?
options.reaction: "Gently," she says. "Let the smell come to you."

options.en: The aroma opens right up. May I breathe deeper?
options.ko: 향이 확 열리네요. 더 깊이 들이마셔도 돼요?
options.reaction: "Oh, please do," she says. "A wine like this wants to be enjoyed."

normal.text: "Let it breathe," she says softly. "A wine that opens slowly always gives you more."
You take your first sip. The wine is warm and round on your tongue. "There it is," she says.

options.en: I take a big mouthful. I want the full body.
options.ko: 크게 한 모금 머금을게요. 풀바디를 제대로 느끼고 싶어요.
options.reaction: "Bold," she says. "This one can take it."

options.en: Just a little. I let it curl on my tongue.
options.reaction: "Patient," she smiles. "The slow way tastes better."

normal.text: "The body is full," she says. "It fills your whole mouth. Feel how it holds."
"Look at the legs," she says, tilting the glass. "See how they run down slow? That means it is rich."

options.en: The finish is so long. I will sit with it.
options.ko: 피니시가 정말 길어요. 여운을 좀 더 느끼고 갈게요.
options.reaction: "Yes," she says. "A long finish is a gift. Don't rush it."

options.en: Book me for the next tasting. I want this again.
options.ko: 다음 시음회도 예약해 주세요. 이거 또 느끼고 싶어요.
options.reaction: "With pleasure," she says. "I had a feeling you would come back."

normal.text: The taste stays with you for a long time. "That is the finish," she says. "The best ones never really leave."
You step out into the night, warm from the wine. One glass, one hour, and the whole world feels softer.

hard.text: You arrive at an intimate wine tasting, where Ms. Vinter, the sommelier, welcomes you with a knowing smile. "Come closer," she says. "Tonight, we do everything slowly."
She pours a splash of red wine into your glass. "Only a taste for now," she murmurs. "Hold it by the stem — the bowl is where the warmth ruins everything."

options.en: I know my way around a swirl. My wrist is rather good.
options.ko: 스월은 좀 다뤄봤죠. 제 손목이 꽤 괜찮거든요.
options.reaction: "Confident already," she laughs. "Then show me what you can do."

options.en: Please guide me slowly, since this is truly my first time.
options.reaction: "Don't worry," she smiles. "Everyone has a first taste, and I rather enjoy the first."

hard.text: You swirl the wine gently, and it spins and climbs the sides of the glass. "Lovely," she says. "That is how the aromas wake up and begin to open."
"Bury your nose in the glass," Ms. Vinter says. "Breathe it in deeply. A fine wine loves to be smelled long before it is ever tasted."

options.en: How deep should I go? Am I doing this right?
options.ko: 얼마나 깊이 넣어야 해요? 이렇게 하는 거 맞아요?
options.reaction: "Gently," she says. "Let the aroma rise to meet you."

options.en: The aroma opens the moment I lean in. May I breathe deeper?
options.ko: 몸을 기울이자마자 향이 확 열리네요. 더 깊이 들이마셔도 돼요?
options.reaction: "Oh, please do," she says. "A wine this open longs to be enjoyed."

hard.text: "Let it breathe," she says softly. "A wine that opens slowly always has more to give you."
You take your very first sip, and the wine spreads warm and round across your tongue. "There it is," she says quietly.

options.en: I take a generous mouthful, because I want the full body.
options.ko: 크게 한 모금 머금을게요. 풀바디를 제대로 느끼고 싶으니까요.
options.reaction: "Bold," she says. "This one can take everything you give it."

options.en: Only a little, so it can curl slowly on my tongue.
options.reaction: "Patient," she smiles. "The slow way always tastes better."

hard.text: "This one is full in the body," she says. "It fills your whole mouth and refuses to let go. Feel how it holds you."
"Watch the legs," she says, tilting the glass so they catch the light. "See how slowly they run down? That is a wine with something to hide."

options.en: The finish is so long. I would rather sit here and let it linger.
options.ko: 피니시가 정말 길어요. 여기 앉아서 여운을 좀 더 두고 싶어요.
options.reaction: "Yes," she says. "A long finish is a rare gift. You must never rush it."

options.en: Book me for your next tasting. I already want to feel all of this again.
options.ko: 다음 시음회도 예약해 주세요. 벌써 이 느낌을 또 느끼고 싶어요.
options.reaction: "With pleasure," she says. "Somehow I had a feeling you would be back."

hard.text: The taste lingers with you long after the glass is empty. "That is the finish," she says. "The finest wines are the ones that never truly leave you."
You step out into the night, still warm from the wine, and the whole world feels softer than it did an hour ago. One glass, and everything has slowed down.

wink.swirl: 손목으로 잔을 돌리는 스월은 향을 깨우는 기술이에요. 그런데 '손목에 자신 있다'는 말은, 와인 밖에서도 들어본 것 같지 않나요.
wink.nose: '코를 깊이 넣으라'는 건 향을 제대로 맡는 정석이에요. 다만 그 자세를 남이 보면 오해할 수도 있죠.
wink.breathe: '숨 쉬게 두라'는 건 와인 얘기예요. 천천히 열릴수록 더 준다는 말도요. 어디까지가 와인 얘긴지는 행간에 있어요.
wink.body: '바디감이 풀바디'는 입안을 꽉 채우는 무게감을 뜻해요. 다만 body라는 단어를 고른 건, 소믈리에의 선택이죠.
wink.legs: 잔벽을 타고 흐르는 물줄기를 legs라고 불러요. '다리를 보라'는 말이 순수하게 들리려면 와인을 좀 알아야 해요.
wink.finish: 입에 남는 여운을 피니시라고 해요. '피니시가 길다', '여운을 남긴다'는 칭찬은, 와인에게도 그 밖에게도 쓸 수 있죠.
wink.tongue: '혀에 감긴다'는 건 와인의 질감 표현이에요. 감기는 게 와인인지 아닌지는, 마셔 본 사람만 알아요.
wink.mouthful: '크게 한 모금 머금는다'는 건 풀바디를 제대로 느끼는 방법이에요. 소믈리에가 '이 와인은 감당할 수 있다'고 덧붙이면, 그건 또 다른 얘기고요.

winkEn.swirl: The swirl is how you wake a wine's aroma with your wrist. Still, "I'm confident with my wrist" is a line you may have heard somewhere other than a tasting.
winkEn.nose: "Put your nose in" is simply the right way to smell a wine. Whether the pose looks innocent to a passer-by is another matter.
winkEn.breathe: "Let it breathe" is about the wine. So is "the slower it opens, the more it gives." Where the wine talk ends lives between the lines.
winkEn.body: A "full body" means a wine that fills the mouth with weight. That she chose the word body, however, was the sommelier's own decision.
winkEn.legs: The streams that run down the glass are called legs. "Look at the legs" only sounds innocent once you know your wine.
winkEn.finish: The taste a wine leaves behind is its finish. "A long finish" and "it lingers" are compliments you could pay a wine — or something else entirely.
winkEn.tongue: "It curls on your tongue" describes a wine's texture. Whether it is only the wine that curls, only a taster would know.
winkEn.mouthful: "A big mouthful" is how you truly feel a full body. When the sommelier adds that "this one can take it," that is a different sentence altogether.

tasting.en: an event where you try wines

sommelier.en: a wine expert who serves wine

ms.en: a polite title before a woman's name

stem.en: the thin part of a glass you hold

bowl.en: the round part of a wine glass

know.en: to have something in your mind

swirl.en: to turn wine gently around the glass

wrist.en: the joint between your hand and arm

climbs.en: moves up the side, from climb

sides.en: the inner walls of the glass

nose.en: the part you smell with; a wine's smell

breathe.en: to take in air; to let air reach the wine

smell.en: what you notice with your nose

lean.en: to bend your body toward something

may.en: a polite word to ask permission

tongue.en: the part in your mouth for taste

spreads.en: moves out over an area, from spread

across.en: from one side to the other

mouthful.en: as much as fills your mouth

mouth.en: the part of your face you eat with

legs.en: the streams that run down a wine glass

tilting.en: leaning to one side, from tilt

catch.en: to take or hold the light

something.en: a thing you do not name

finish.en: the taste a wine leaves behind

finishes.en: brings to an end, from finish

book.en: to save a time for later

lingers.en: stays a long time, from linger

linger.en: to stay for a long time

feels.en: seems a certain way, from feel

slowed.en: past form of slow, became slower

evening.en: the late part of the day

guest.en: a person you invite or host

left.en: past form of leave, went away

which.en: a word that adds about a thing

dove.en: past form of dive, went in fast

chased.en: past form of chase, ran after

eyes.en: the parts of your face you see with

missed.en: did not go to, from miss

either.en: also, used in a negative sentence

warmed.en: past form of warm, made warm

between.en: in the middle of two things

mine.en: the one that belongs to me

offer.en: to hold out for someone to take

yours.en: the one that belongs to you

yes.en: a word you say to agree
